chapter_title.en: Chapter 48 – The copulation demolishes the immediate dower

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/114)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/114)
text: الرَّجُلِ يَدْخُلُ بِالْمَرْأَةِ ثُمَّ تَدَّعِي عَلَيْهِ مَهْرَهَا فَقَالَ إِذَا دَخَلَ بِهَا فَقَدْ هَدَمَ الْعَاجِلَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding the man who copulated with the woman, then she claimed upon him for her dower. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When he copulated with her, so it demolished the immediate (dower) (i.e. rendered it irrelevant)’.
en.sarwar: 3. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from ‘Ubayd ibn Zurarah who has said the following: “About the case of a man who goes to bed with a woman, then she asks for payment of mahr (dower), abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘When he goes to bed with her the condition of immediate payment is destroyed.’”
